targets.name: Northwind Studio
targets.change_text: Removed the free Starter tier; now a single $99/mo Pro plan.
targets.new_thing: Single $99/mo Pro plan, positioned as 'serious teams only'.
targets.before: Free Starter + $49 Growth + $149 Pro three-tier structure.
targets.implication: They're moving upmarket and abandoning low-end leads. Opening to capture price-sensitive founders Northwind is now ignoring.
targets.summary: Removed the free Starter tier; now a single $99/mo Pro plan.

targets.name: Globex Creative
targets.change_text: Published a new case study and added an AI services page.
targets.new_thing: Added a dedicated 'AI brand systems' service line.
targets.before: Services limited to traditional brand identity.
targets.implication: AI-positioning is becoming table stakes among peers. Reinforce Example Co's deeper AI-native differentiation in messaging.
targets.summary: Published a new case study and added an AI services page.
